Home.description: Building transparent and sustainable industrial cooperation between global markets through consulting, trade coordination, and intelligent digital infrastructure.

About.label: ABOUT WANG CORP.
About.title: Global industrial coordination with modern digital infrastructure.
About.description: WANG CORP. is an international coordination and infrastructure company focused on heavy industry, engineering cooperation, strategic sourcing and digital industrial platforms.

transparent.title: Transparent Coordination
transparent.text: We believe trust is built through operational transparency, realistic expectations and long-term cooperation.

markets.title: Bridging Global Markets
markets.text: WANG CORP. connects international industrial ecosystems between China and global markets.

lean.title: Lean & Efficient Operations
lean.text: We prioritize efficiency, agility and practical execution over unnecessary corporate overhead.

digital.title: Digital Industrial Infrastructure
digital.text: WANG CORP. is developing intelligent digital platforms for global industrial communication and collaboration.

Services.label: SERVICES
Services.title: Industrial Consulting & Global Coordination
Services.description: Supporting international industrial projects through sourcing, consulting and project coordination.

coordination.title: Industrial Coordination
coordination.text: International supplier coordination, RFQ management, project tracking and engineering communication support.

sourcing.title: Strategic Sourcing
sourcing.text: Global industrial procurement and manufacturing partnerships focused on steel, mining and heavy industry.

infrastructure.title: Digital Infrastructure
infrastructure.text: Enterprise-grade industrial platforms integrating AI, multilingual communication and operational coordination.

communication.title: AI-Assisted Communication
communication.text: Real-time multilingual industrial communication systems for global business operations.

Platform.label: WANG PLATFORM
Platform.title: Industrial Coordination System
Platform.description: Enterprise-grade digital infrastructure for supplier coordination, multilingual communication, RFQ management and international industrial collaboration.

translation.title: AI Translation Layer
translation.text: Multilingual communication infrastructure designed for industrial terminology and cross-border project communication.

crm.title: Industrial CRM
crm.text: Company, plant, department, contact, project and equipment-level relationship management for heavy industry.

rfq.title: RFQ Management
rfq.text: Structured request, quotation, document and technical clarification workflows.

supplier.title: Supplier Coordination
supplier.text: A controlled workspace for suppliers, clients, engineers and coordinators.

portal.title: Secure Client Portal
portal.text: Permission-based access for clients, suppliers and internal users.

project.title: Project Communication
project.text: Centralized project records, meeting notes, technical discussions and progress updates.

documents.title: Document Center
documents.text: Organized storage for catalogs, drawings, quotations, specifications and project documents.

global.title: Global Collaboration
global.text: A digital foundation for cooperation between China, Türkiye, Europe and global heavy industry markets.

Contact.label: CONTACT
Contact.title: Contact Infrastructure Under Development
Contact.description: Official WANG CORP. communication channels, enterprise email infrastructure and client access systems are currently being prepared.

Portal.label: PORTAL
Portal.title: Industrial Intelligence Platform
Portal.description: A centralized platform for companies, contacts, projects, RFQs and industrial resources.

ai.title: AI Tools
ai.text: Future industrial intelligence and AI translation modules.

Companies.label: COMPANIES
Companies.title: Industrial Company Database
Companies.description: A structured database for partners, clients, suppliers and target accounts.
